utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes all five top-level items. Next, verify each is fully specified with costs. 1) health_coverage: explicitly lists physical and mental health insurance with costs and totals; meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs and a total; satisfies 'home/contents insurance with costs'. 3) travel_coverage: includes a travel insurance plan with cost and total; satisfies 'travel insurance with costs'. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services (concierge) with cost and total; satisfies 'any enhancement services with costs'. 5) total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are present and specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I scanned the final coverage plan and matched each named product to the exact item names present in the ground-truth ratings. Items present in the plan and found in the ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health product referenced as 'HealthFirst Standard Mental Health'), Preventive Care Package (health enhancement), ParisHome Luxury Coverage (not present in ratings, so excluded), Fine Art & Electronics Protection (not present, excluded), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), Family Insurance Concierge (not present; closest in ratings is 'Concierge Services' but name differs, excluded). Only items with exact name matches from the ground-truth are mapped below.
